---
title: "The OSC now has an advisory board!"
date: 2024-01-08
subtitle: "We will benefit from the advice of key internal and external actors for 2024 - 2027"
categories: ["Announcement"]

template: templates/news-template.html
filters:
  - templates/process-news-yaml.lua
---


<p>The OSC is advised by key internal and external actors appointed for 3-year terms. Find who is part of our advisory board this term here: <a href="/people/advisors.qmd">Advisory Board</a></p>
<div class="g-clear"></div>
